AC-1.description: Gate enforces ratio band 0.6-1.6 for non-quarantined routes
AC-1.note: Behavior pre-existed from prior sprint (gate functions already implemented). Tests provide regression coverage.

AC-2.description: Gate requires >=2 anchors within 150mi of centroid
AC-2.note: Behavior pre-existed from prior sprint. Tests provide regression coverage.

AC-3.description: Gate rejects degenerate geometry (<=4 points OR <1 pt/mi)
AC-3.note: Behavior pre-existed from prior sprint. Tests provide regression coverage.

AC-4.description: Quarantine flag skips ratio check but applies degenerate + region checks
AC-4.note: Added explicit quarantine param to determineGateVerdict. Existing ratio=null path already worked but explicit flag makes intent clear.

AC-5.description: Bounded repair round limits attempts to 2 and keeps better attempt by ratio distance
AC-5.note: New: reconstructForRouteWithSimulatedRepair action + runSimulatedRepair wrapper. Repair round logic reuses same |log(ratio)| comparison as production reconstructForRoute.

AC-6.description: Pre-existing geometry rows are re-evaluated against the full gate
AC-6.note: New: reevaluateExistingGeometry function + reevaluatePreexistingGeometry action + listGeometryWithVerification query + flipGeometryVerdict mutation.
